# Channels

## Distribution Channels

| Channel | Description | Target Segment | Cost |
|---|---|---|---|
| Mobile App | iOS & Android app | All segments | Low |
| USSD | Feature-phone access | Rural, informal | Very Low |
| Agent Network | Human touchpoints | Rural, elderly | Medium |
| Branch Offices | Physical service | All segments | High |
| WhatsApp Bot | Automated support | Urban youth | Low |
| Partnerships | Employer, NGO tie-ups | Salaried, informal | Low |

## Channel Strategy
- **Acquire**: Digital marketing, community referrals, employer partnerships
- **Onboard**: Simplified KYC via mobile (selfie + ID)
- **Retain**: Loyalty rewards, personalized financial tips
- **Grow**: Cross-sell products at key lifecycle moments

## Agent Network
- Target: 200 agents by end of Year 1
- Requirements: Smartphone, float capital (KES 20,000 min.)
- Compensation: 1% commission on transactions
